title: Settings
description: Manage your account and application preferences.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Manage your profile, theme, and language.
preferences.appearanceDescription: Choose how the application looks to you.

security.title: Security
security.passwordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteAccountAndDataDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.deleteAccountConfirmationDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all of your data. This action cannot be undone.

system.overviewDescription: A snapshot of the data stored across the platform.

users.managementDescription: View, add, and remove users from the platform.
users.addUserDescription: Create a new user account on the platform.
users.removeUserConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {name}? This will permanently delete their account and all associated data.
